tool_calls.content:
get system interface physical
== [onboard]
 ==[port1]
  mode: static

  status: up
  speed: 1000Mbps (Duplex: full)
  FEC: none
  FEC_cap: none

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
show firewall policy
config firewall policy
    edit 100
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-NAT"
        set uuid 868edb74-2aaa-51f1-7993-02c265357be3
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set nat enable
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"fortigate-firewall","command":"config firewall addrgrp
    edit "allowed-outbound-dests"
        set member "all"
    next
end
config firewall policy
    edit 10
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-allow-business"
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "allowed-outbound-dests"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "DNS" "HTTP" "HTTPS"
        set nat enable
    next
    edit 20
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-deny-all-other"
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action deny
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
    next
end
show firewall policy"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
config firewall addrgrp

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (addrgrp) #     edit "allowed-outbound-dests"
new entry 'allowed-outbound-dests' added

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (allowed-outbound~sts) #         set member "all"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (allowed-outbound~sts) #     next

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (addrgrp) # end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # config firewall policy

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) #     edit 10
new entry '10' added

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (10) #         set name "LAN-to-WAN-allow-business"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (10) #         set srcintf "port2"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (10) #         set dstintf "port1"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (10) #         set action accept

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (10) #         set srcaddr "all"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (10) #         set dstaddr "allowed-outbound-dests"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (10) #         set schedule "always"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (10) #         set service "DNS" "HTTP" "HTTPS"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (10) #         set nat enable

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (10) #     next

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) #     edit 20
new entry '20' added

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (20) #         set name "LAN-to-WAN-deny-all-other"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (20) #         set srcintf "port2"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (20) #         set dstintf "port1"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (20) #         set action deny

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (20) #         set srcaddr "all"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (20) #         set dstaddr "all"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (20) #         set schedule "always"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (20) #         set service "ALL"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (20) #     next

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) # end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # show firewall policy
config firewall policy
    edit 100
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-NAT"
        set uuid 868edb74-2aaa-51f1-7993-02c265357be3
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set nat enable
    next
    edit 10
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-allow-business"
        set uuid d81f8184-32af-51f1-e0c5-fe95ae7800c1
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "allowed-outbound-dests"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "DNS" "HTTP" "HTTPS"
        set nat enable
next
    edit 20
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-deny-all-other"
        set uuid d838c2e8-32af-51f1-0b4c-80c86041ac3e
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set logtraffic disable
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"fortigate-firewall","command":"config firewall policy
    move 10 before 100
    move 20 before 100
end
show firewall policy"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
config firewall policy

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) #     move 10 before 100

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) #     move 20 before 100

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) # end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # show firewall policy
config firewall policy
    edit 10
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-allow-business"
        set uuid d81f8184-32af-51f1-e0c5-fe95ae7800c1
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "allowed-outbound-dests"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "DNS" "HTTP" "HTTPS"
        set nat enable
    next
    edit 20
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-deny-all-other"
        set uuid d838c2e8-32af-51f1-0b4c-80c86041ac3e
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set logtraffic disable
    next
edit 100
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-NAT"
        set uuid 868edb74-2aaa-51f1-7993-02c265357be3
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set nat enable
    next
end
